title: Mining Gadgets Fabric
description: Because mining with lasers is cool
body:
Welcome to Dire's Mining Gadgets!

DISCLAIMER: This is a fabric port of Mining Gadgets if your looking for the forge version go [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mining-gadgets)

 

Sometimes you want a quick change of pace when it comes to mining. Pickaxes. Drills. Bores. Robots. Quarries. These are all great options. Now you can use lasers too if you want. 

Also please consider joining my discord: https://discord.gg/xWPzrfuTjE
